TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ｏtada cinamocay ko 'alo i 'Amis no 'orip. == Itini i 'Amis no 'orip tadacinamocay ko 'awol, caay aca ko ma'araway a pinalengwan, pakayni to taneng no mato'asay i, adihay ko mamiparayray no mato'asay to serangwan no Pangcah. Nai kamara'an taha saki'orip a lalosidan, nga'ay a sapi'edaw ko 'aol. Adihay ko kasaromaroma no 'aol,nga'ay sapisanga to fadilay, Ano nisaloma' ko 'Amis i, o kilang o 'aol o 'oway o eli' ko sapisaloma'. O 'aol i, o hasapad o hatakar ato hacokis.
S.PHON: == *taɬ~ɮa ʦinamo~uʦaj ko~u ʡaɾo~u i ʡamis no~u ʡo~urip. == itini i ʡamis no~u ʡo~urip taɬ~ɮaʦinamo~uʦaj ko~u ʡawo~uɾ, ʦaaj aʦa ko~u maʡarawaj a pinaɾəŋwan, pakajni to~u tanəŋ no~u mato~uʡasaj i, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mamiparajraj no~u mato~uʡasaj to~u səraŋwan no~u paŋʦaħ. nai kamaraʡan taħa sakiʡo~urip a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, ŋaʡaj a sapiʡəɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡao~uɾ. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaro~umaro~uma no~u ʡao~uɾ,ŋaʡaj sapisaŋa to~u faɬ~ɮiɾaj, ano~u nisaɾo~umaʡ ko~u ʡamis i, o~u kiɾaŋ o~u ʡao~uɾ o~u ʡo~uwaj o~u əɾiʡ ko~u sapisaɾo~umaʡ. o~u ʡao~uɾ i, o~u ħasapaɬ~ɮ o~u ħatakar ato~u ħaʦo~ukis.
S.FORM: == Ｏtada cinamocay ko 'alo i 'Amis no 'orip. == Itini i 'Amis no 'orip tadacinamocay ko 'awol, caay aca ko ma'araway a pinalengwan, pakayni to taneng no mato'asay i, adihay ko mamiparayray no mato'asay to serangwan no Pangcah. Nai kamara'an taha saki'orip a lalosidan, nga'ay a sapi'edaw ko 'aol. Adihay ko kasaromaroma no 'aol,nga'ay sapisanga to fadilay, Ano nisaloma' ko 'Amis i, o kilang o 'aol o 'oway o eli' ko sapisaloma'. O 'aol i, o hasapad o hatakar ato hacokis.
S.PHON: == *taɬ~ɮa ʦinamo~uʦaj ko~u ʡaɾo~u i ʡamis no~u ʡo~urip. == itini i ʡamis no~u ʡo~urip taɬ~ɮaʦinamo~uʦaj ko~u ʡawo~uɾ, ʦaaj aʦa ko~u maʡarawaj a pinaɾəŋwan, pakajni to~u tanəŋ no~u mato~uʡasaj i, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u mamiparajraj no~u mato~uʡasaj to~u səraŋwan no~u paŋʦaħ. nai kamaraʡan taħa sakiʡo~urip a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, ŋaʡaj a sapiʡəɬ~ɮaw ko~u ʡao~uɾ. aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kasaro~umaro~uma no~u ʡao~uɾ,ŋaʡaj sapisaŋa to~u faɬ~ɮiɾaj, ano~u nisaɾo~umaʡ ko~u ʡamis i, o~u kiɾaŋ o~u ʡao~uɾ o~u ʡo~uwaj o~u əɾiʡ ko~u sapisaɾo~umaʡ. o~u ʡao~uɾ i, o~u ħasapaɬ~ɮ o~u ħatakar ato~u ħaʦo~ukis.
